group: Management of software engineering Research Group (MSWI)

management_of_software_engineering_resea: Management research group at FIT focuses on the development of advanced methods of processes of software development management. Group is more dealing with development in area Big Data technology.
research_interests: Management of processes, projects, quality and risk in software management.
Object oriented software metrics and standards
Specification methods of processes and IT projects
Methods and tools for analyzing and design of processes
Methods of formal analyzing, design and verification of business processes
Modelling and optimization of business processes
Development of technologies applied in Big Data area
Development of tools for support of e-learning
Management, improvement and ensurence of quality by ISO 9000
current_research_topics: Management research group at FIT is currently engaged in research on the development of advanced methods of processes of software development management. Group is more dealing with development in area Big Data technology.
significant_results: Business Rules Definition for Decision Support System Using Matrix Grammar
Business Rules Definition for Decision Support System Using Matrix Grammar
Performance Measurement of Complex Event Platforms
A tool for formalization of the business rules using business vocabulary and semantics
Formalization of the business rules - Extension
cooperation: In the area Big Data processing, we offer collaboration to solve the tasks from area application of Business Rules in information systems.

overview: Management research group at FIT focuses on the development of advanced methods of processes of software development management. Group is more dealing with development in area Big Data technology.
